phrases.intent_en: Ask how long it takes to walk the complete circuit of the walls
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps faut-il pour faire le tour complet des remparts ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh tahn fo-TEEL poor FAIR luh toor kom-PLAY day rahn-PAR
phrases.cultural_note: Walking the complete circuit of Saint-Malo's walls takes about 45 minutes. The views of the sea and Channel Islands are spectacular.

responses.english: About forty-five minutes for the full circuit.
responses.phonetic: sah prahn ahn-vee-ROHN kah-RAHN-sank mee-NOOT. lah voo eh man-YEE-feek
responses.french: Environ quarante-cinq minutes pour le tour complet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to access the rampart walk
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on monter sur les remparts ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON mon-TAY soor lay rahn-PAR
phrases.cultural_note: There are several access points to the ramparts. The main stairway is near Porte Saint-Vincent.

responses.english: The main stairway is near Porte Saint-Vincent.
responses.phonetic: less-kah-LYAY prahn-see-PAL eh preh duh lah PORT san-van-SAHN
responses.french: L'escalier principal est près de la porte Saint-Vincent.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main gate into the walled city is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la porte principale pour entrer dans la ville close ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah port prahn-SEE-pal poor ahn-TRAY dan lah VEEL kloz
phrases.cultural_note: The main gate is the Porte Saint-Vincent, on the south side facing the harbor. There's also the smaller Porte de la Vielle.

responses.english: Porte Saint-Vincent, on the south side, facing the port.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.french: La porte Saint-Vincent, côté sud, face au port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Grand Bé gate and island
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous me parler de la porte du Grand Bé et de l'île ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo muh par-LAY duh lah port doo grahn BAY ay duh LEEL
phrases.cultural_note: Grand Bé is a tidal island with the tomb of the writer Chateaubriand. It's only accessible on foot at low tide — check the tide times.

responses.english: The island is only accessible at low tide. Check the times.
responses.phonetic: leel eh-tahk-seess-SEEB-lah mah-RAY bahs seul-MAHN. vay-ree-fee-AY layz oh-REHR
responses.french: L'île est accessible à marée basse seulement. Vérifiez les horaires.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the casemate tunnels under the walls
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des tunnels sous les remparts ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day TOO-nel soo lay rahn-PAR
phrases.cultural_note: The casemates are bomb-proof tunnels under the walls, built in the 18th century. Some are open to visitors and offer exhibits on the history.

responses.english: Yes, some casemates are open with exhibits.
responses.phonetic: wee, sair-TEN kahz-MAHT soo too-VER ah-VEK dayz eks-poh-zee-SYOHN
responses.french: Oui, certaines casemates sont ouvertes avec des expositions.
